# Test: apx lint for Parquet schemas
# Verifies lint command works with Parquet format (native Go, no external tools)

# Test lint on valid schema (should pass — native Go, no external tool needed)
exec apx lint --format=parquet valid.parquet
exec apx lint valid.parquet

# Test lint on invalid schema (should fail)
! exec apx lint invalid.parquet
stderr 'unknown physical type'

# Test lint on schema with duplicate column names
! exec apx lint duplicate.parquet
stderr 'duplicate column name'

# Test lint on schema with bad column naming
! exec apx lint bad_name.parquet
stderr 'snake_case'

# Test with non-existent file (should fail)
! exec apx lint /tmp/nonexistent_parquet_12345.parquet

-- valid.parquet --
message event {
  required binary id (STRING);
  required binary event_type (STRING);
  required int64 timestamp (TIMESTAMP_MILLIS);
  optional binary user_id (STRING);
}
-- invalid.parquet --
message event {
  required supertype id (STRING);
}
-- duplicate.parquet --
message event {
  required binary id (STRING);
  optional int32 id;
}
-- bad_name.parquet --
message event {
  required binary userId (STRING);
}
